message:
feat(lockstep): add Bun TypeScript entrypoint resolution support

Bun natively executes .ts and .tsx files, so when resolving entrypoints
for the Bun runtime the lockstep harness must consider TypeScript
extensions in addition to the standard .js/.mjs/.cjs set. Without this,
projects using Bun with TypeScript entrypoints (e.g. main: "src" →
src/index.ts, or main: "dist/server" → dist/server.ts) would fail to
resolve.

Changes:
- Add `entrypoint_extensions()` method that returns ["ts","tsx","js","mjs","cjs"]
  for Bun and ["js","mjs","cjs"] for all other runtimes
- Add `directory_entry_candidates()` method (runtime-aware variant of the
  previous static DIRECTORY_ENTRY_CANDIDATES)
- Thread `runtime` parameter through `resolve_entry_candidate()` so
  extension lookup and directory index scanning use the correct set
- Add two integration tests: directory entrypoint (src/index.ts) and
  extensionless main with .ts resolution (dist/server.ts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
